rules_fired.because: DMSO freezes at ~19°C and is completely solid in a 4°C cold room or on ice. Pipetting partially-solidified DMSO gives large systematic volume errors. DMSO also rapidly penetrates skin and carries dissolved solutes transdermally, making skin contact with DMSO drug stocks a real toxicity exposure route. Polystyrene is dissolved/leached by DMSO over hours.
rules_fired.cite: Sigma-Aldrich DMSO Product Information Sheet 276855. NIOSH CAS 67-68-5 skin absorption note. Polychemistry compatibility table (DMSO vs. plastics).
